findings.snippet:
+
+model Diagnosis {
+  id          String   @id @default(uuid())
+  patientId   String
+  patient     Patient  @relation(fields: [patientId], references: [id])
+  diagnosis   String   
+  icd10Code   String
findings.code_pattern_comment: Unencrypted PHI primitive type at rest
